SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2003 - JUDGMENT AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT LI LU AND AGAINST DEFENDANT/RESPONDENT RICHARD COCHRANE IN THE SUM OF $2,675.00. JUDGE: LILLIAN K. SING; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE; REPORTER: CARLITO MANDIA (D. 613)

MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-15-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

MINI MINUTES: Appearing: Plaintiff/Respondent Li Lu and her interpreter Shirley Wong, and Defendant/Appellant Richard Cochrane.
